extortion.description: [AI generated] Pellenc is a global manufacturer and distributor of professional grade tools and machinery primarily for use in the horticulture, viticulture, forestry, and municipal sectors. Its products include vine harvesters, battery-powered handheld tools, olive and fruit harvesters, and ground care equipment. Headquartered in France, Pellenc was founded in 1973 and has innovation at its heart, with over 1,000 patents registered.
